blended.narrative: Big Sky is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,667 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 6" over the past week. Current depth: 59".
